Hero.title:
Welcome to your
home in the hills
Hero.subtitle: Explore our curated day-by-day itinerary for the perfect journey from Bangalore and around Chikmagalur.

faqs.q: What time is check-in and check-out?
faqs.a: Check-in is at 2:00 PM and check-out is at 11:00 AM.
Yes, we are a pet-friendly property! Please inform us in advance.
Yes, we can arrange taxi pickups from Bangalore or Mangalore airport.

localTips.title: Network Availability
localTips.desc: Airtel works best. Jio is patchy. Enjoy the digital detox!

localTips.title: Payments
localTips.desc: UPI is widely accepted, but carry cash for remote shops.

localTips.title: Road Conditions
localTips.desc: The last 2km to the estate is an off-road path. Drive slow.

localTips.title: Photography
localTips.desc: Early mornings (6:30 AM) offer the best mist in the coffee estate.

roadTripStops.title: Departure from Bangalore
roadTripStops.desc: Start your journey early to beat the city traffic.
roadTripStops.tips: Leave by 6:00 AM. Watch a beautiful highway sunrise.

roadTripStops.title: Shree Doddagaddavalli Temple
roadTripStops.desc: 12th-century Hoysala masterpiece famous for four unique shrines.
roadTripStops.tips: Capture the symmetry of the four shrines from the eastern entrance.

roadTripStops.title: Hoysaleswara Temple, Halebidu
roadTripStops.desc: Famous for intricately carved walls depicting Hindu mythology.
roadTripStops.tips: Zoom in on the intricate jewelry carved on the statues. Best lit in late morning.

roadTripStops.title: Yagachi Water Adventure
roadTripStops.desc: Take a refreshing break by the backwaters of the Yagachi dam.
roadTripStops.tips: Action shots of the water sports look great with a fast shutter speed.

roadTripStops.title: Belur Chennakeshava Temple
roadTripStops.desc: Breathtaking marvel of Hoysala architecture and UNESCO site.
roadTripStops.tips: Look for the 'Darpana Sundari'. Use a wide-angle lens.

roadTripStops.title: Mudigere
roadTripStops.desc: Landscape shifts to lush green hills and endless coffee estates.
roadTripStops.tips: Roll down the windows and capture a quick video of the misty roads.

roadTripStops.title: Arrival at Milan Farm Stay
roadTripStops.desc: Welcome to your home in nature. Enjoy estate-grown coffee.
roadTripStops.tips: The golden hour sunlight hitting the estate house is perfect.

day1Restaurants.title: Mango Tree Veg Restaurant, Halebidu
day1Restaurants.desc: Clean vegetarian restaurant perfectly timed for your lunch break.

day2Stops.title: Mullayanagiri Base Point
day2Stops.desc: Base point for Mullayanagiri Peak. Park your car here and take a jeep to the top.
day2Stops.tips: Trek up the final stairs early morning to avoid the crowd and heat.
day2Stops.parkingInfo: Park your vehicle here. Jeep ride required from this point onwards.

day2Stops.title: Jhari Waterfalls
day2Stops.tips: Prepare for a bumpy jeep ride down. Carry a waterproof bag.
day2Stops.entryFee: Jeep ride costs approx ₹700 per vehicle.

day2Stops.title: Datta Peeta (Baba Budangiri)
day2Stops.desc: Historic pilgrimage site with incredible mountain viewpoints.
day2Stops.tips: Respect the religious significance of the site.

day2Stops.title: Manikyadhara Falls
day2Stops.desc: Natural waterfall known for its refreshing stop.
day2Stops.tips: The water is considered holy. Great for a quick splash.

day2Stops.title: Hirekolale Lake
day2Stops.desc: Peaceful lake views perfect for sunset photography.
day2Stops.tips: Sunset reflects beautifully on the water with hills in the backdrop.

day2Stops.title: Freedom Park (Chikmagalur)
day2Stops.desc: Evening relaxation at a family-friendly park.
day2Stops.tips: Great spot for kids to play and unwind after a long day.

day2Restaurants.title: Mayura Deluxe
day2Restaurants.desc: Comfortable and popular pure vegetarian dining.

day2Restaurants.title: Hotel Adrika
day2Restaurants.desc: Premium multi-cuisine restaurant with a great ambiance.

day2Restaurants.title: Chikmagalur Food Court
day2Restaurants.desc: A great stop offering a wide variety of food options in one place.

day3Stops.title: Devaramane View Point
day3Stops.desc: Misty hills and incredible sunrise viewpoint.
day3Stops.tips: The winds can be very strong. Carry a windcheater.

day3Stops.title: Bettada Bhairaveshwara Temple
day3Stops.desc: Hilltop temple with a scenic drive through the forests.
day3Stops.tips: The drive itself is beautiful. Stop safely for photos.

day3Stops.title: Majagadahalli Waterfalls
day3Stops.desc: Hidden waterfall requiring a short nature walk.
day3Stops.tips: Wear shoes with good grip. The path can be slippery.
day3Stops.localTips: Ask locals for directions as signal might be weak.

day4Stops.title: Kelagur Tea Estate
day4Stops.desc: Explore tea plantations, take photos, and buy local tea.
day4Stops.tips: Visit the factory outlet to buy fresh tea directly from the estate.

day4Stops.title: Ranijhari Viewpoint
day4Stops.desc: Iconic winding roads and a must-visit photo stop.

day4Stops.title: Kodige Falls
day4Stops.desc: Seasonal waterfall accessible via a short trek.
day4Stops.tips: Carry drinking water for the short hike.

day4Stops.title: Maidadi View Point
day4Stops.tips: Very secluded, perfect for peaceful reflection.

day4Stops.title: Hornadu Annapoorneshwari Temple
day4Stops.desc: Famous temple providing a peaceful ending to the trip.
day4Stops.tips: Prasadam (lunch/dinner) is served to all devotees. Highly recommended.
day4Stops.localTips: Dress code applies for entry to the inner sanctum.

day5Stops.title: Netravati Peak Trek
day5Stops.desc: Scenic trek offering breathtaking views of the Western Ghats.
day5Stops.tips: Trek permissions and slots must be booked in advance.
day5Stops.localTips: Local Guide: [+91 XXXXX XXXXX]. Pre-book entry tickets via Aranya Vihara portal.

day5Stops.title: Bandaje Falls Trek
day5Stops.desc: A challenging but rewarding trek to the stunning Bandaje Arbi falls.
day5Stops.tips: Ensure you have enough water and wear good grip shoes.
day5Stops.localTips: Advance entry booking is strictly required via Aranya Vihara portal.

day5Stops.title: Ettina Bhuja Trek
day5Stops.desc: Short yet moderately steep trek offering 360-degree panoramic views.
day5Stops.tips: Trek in the early morning to avoid the heat. Very scenic during monsoon.
day5Stops.localTips: Home Made Lunch: [+91 XXXXX XXXXX]. Advance entry booking via Aranya Vihara portal is required.

TripPlanner.title: Design Your Trip
TripPlanner.subtitle: Select the duration of your stay to view our curated recommendations.

ItineraryTimeline.advanceBookingMsg2: Slots for Mullayanagiri, Baba Budangiri, and Jhari Waterfalls must be booked beforehand via Chikmagalur Tourism.
ItineraryTimeline.advanceBookingMsg5: Permissions and slots for Chikmagalur treks must be booked beforehand via Karnataka Eco Tourism (Aranya Vihara).

Footer.title: Milan Farm Stays
Footer.desc: Curated road trips, hidden gems & unforgettable coffee estate experiences.

ShareButton.shareText:
Hey! Here is the complete digital guide for our trip to Milan Farm Stay. 🌿🚗

It contains the route map, itinerary, and all important contact numbers (including our hosts, home-cooked food, and local delivery options).

💡 *Tip:* Bookmark this link or add it to your home screen for quick offline-like access during the trip!
ShareButton.description: Send this itinerary to your travel companions so everyone stays on track.
